source_text: 皮質醇會提高血糖濃度。
note: APPROVE case — genuinely NEW knowledge (no id collides). Passes both gates; approving adds it to the graph. blood_glucose is referenced by edges, never re-proposed.

nodes.label: 皮質醇
nodes.description: 腎上腺皮質分泌的糖皮質素,促進糖質新生,使血糖上升。

nodes.label: 皮質醇提高血糖
nodes.description: 皮質醇造成血糖上升的單一調控效果(fact node)。

note: FORM-REJECT case — the RegulatoryEffect has HAS_EFFECT but no ON_VARIABLE / direction edge (原文方向不明), so the three-part pattern is incomplete -> Schema gate fail_pattern -> approve disabled. All ids new.

nodes.label: 體抑素
nodes.description: 胰島 δ 細胞分泌,抑制胰島素與升糖素分泌的激素。

nodes.label: 體抑素影響血糖(方向未定)
nodes.description: 原文只說『影響』,未給明確方向,三段式無法完成。

source_text: 胰島素會降低血糖濃度。
note: MEANING-REJECT case — form-valid but biologically WRONG (direction reversed) -> Schema gate PASS -> approve enabled; a human must reject it. H1 isolation: all ids are demo-namespaced (hormone:demo_insulin / physiological_variable:demo_blood_glucose / a new RE), so even an accidental approve writes only a self-contained demo island and CANNOT overwrite or wire wrong biology onto the flagship insulin / blood_glucose retrieval path. Labels still read 胰島素 / 血糖 so the teaching point is unchanged (ids are hidden in the 專家審閱 tab). `make demo-reset` cleans any demo approval.

nodes.label: 胰島素
nodes.description: 示範用胰島素節點(與正式圖譜的 hormone:insulin 分離,避免誤核准污染正式檢索)。

nodes.label: 血糖
nodes.description: 示範用血糖節點(與正式圖譜的 blood_glucose 分離)。

nodes.label: 胰島素提高血糖(錯誤)
nodes.description: AI 將胰島素的效果抽成『提高血糖』,方向與原文相反(抽取錯誤)。

note: PLAIN-SUMMARY (P0) case — schema-valid, no regulatory pattern, NOT a gap -> D5 renders a plain summary and the gate PASSES, so it is approvable. Exercises D5's third outcome live (review S2). New structure node referencing the existing approved structure:pancreas (never re-proposed).

nodes.label: 胰島
nodes.description: 胰臟中分泌胰島素與升糖素的內分泌組織。

source_text: 甲狀腺素會增強腎上腺素對代謝的作用。
note: SCHEMA-GAP case — a permissive/modulating effect (A changes B's effect on C) has no expressible pattern in the current schema. Flagged possible_schema_gap: true -> D5 renders the gap sentence -> gate needs_schema_extension -> approve disabled. All ids new.

nodes.label: 甲狀腺素
nodes.description: 甲狀腺分泌,提高基礎代謝率的激素。

nodes.label: 腎上腺素
nodes.description: 腎上腺髓質分泌,參與代謝與應激反應的激素。
